creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I just updated to Wine 1.1.18 plus a FreeBSD specific patch.  Indeed 
also the previous version built (otherwise it would have been BROKEN, 
not IGNORE), I just failed for some users.  I'm happy it has been 
working for you and hope the new version will also work nicely.
